name: invoice-processing
title: Invoice Processing
description: Upload invoices, extract data with AI, review and approve.
starter_prompt:
Build me an invoice processing app. I want to upload invoice documents (PDF, images), have AI automatically extract the key fields (vendor name, invoice number, dates, amounts, line items), then review and approve them.

Here is what I need:

1. **Upload and extract**: A way to upload an invoice document. When uploaded, an AI automation should read the document and extract structured data — vendor, invoice number, invoice date, due date, total amount, currency, and line items. The extracted fields should populate the invoice record for review.

2. **Review workflow**: Invoices should flow through statuses: draft → processing → review → approved or rejected. After AI extraction, the invoice lands in "review" where I can edit any fields the AI got wrong, then approve or reject.

3. **Dashboard**: A dashboard showing total invoices, how many are pending review, how many approved, and how many in draft. Plus a table of recent invoices.

4. **Invoice list**: A list page with status filter tabs, pagination, and links to each invoice detail page.

5. **Invoice detail**: A detail page showing the uploaded document side-by-side with the extracted fields in an editable form. Approve and reject buttons at the top.

6. **Vendor and GL management**: Collections for vendors (with default GL codes) and GL accounts. A settings page to manage them.

7. **Audit log**: Track all creates, updates, and deletes across invoices, vendors, and GL accounts with before/after state.

8. **Seed data**: A seed script with sample vendors, GL accounts, and a few demo invoices.

Read AGENTS.md and the files in .claude/skills/ first to understand the Lumera SDK patterns, then build it out.
